body.purpose: Article prose. Optimized for long-form mathematical reading.

code.purpose: Code blocks (Shiki github-dark theme) and inline code.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for hover, color, and opacity changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Auth and CTA actions. Indigo background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: opacity 200ms ease; cursor: pointer; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Post Card
components.description: Blog post preview card with category-colored left border.
components.html:
Bài tập9 Thg 6, 2026

Bài tập đạo hàm cơ bản

Tổng hợp các bài tập tính đạo hàm
components.css: .ds-post-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-left: 4px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 20px; transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; } .ds-post-card--baitap { border-left-color: #10b981; } .ds-post-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(79,70,229,0.05); } .ds-post-card__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b7280; } .ds-post-card__title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 8px; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-post-card:hover .ds-post-card__title { color: #4f46e5; } .ds-post-card__summary { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b7280; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.css: .ds-tag { background: #f9fafb; color: #6b7280; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; transition: color 200ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tag:hover { color: #4f46e5; }

components.name: Category Badge
components.description: Category identifier with icon and ring styling.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Geist, sans-serif; } .ds-badge--baitap { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.1); color: #047857; } .ds-badge--lythuyet { background: rgba(124,58,237,0.1); color: #6d28d9; } .ds-badge--aiml { background: rgba(249,115,22,0.1); color: #c2410c; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky top header with blurred backdrop, logo, nav links, auth button.
components.html:
∑Math Blog
Bài tậpLý thuyết
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); font-family: Geist, sans-serif; } .ds-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-logo__icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(79,70,229,0.3); } .ds-logo__text { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; } .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav__link { padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6b7280; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms ease, background 200ms ease; } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #111827; background: #f9fafb; } .ds-nav__link--active { color: #4338ca; background: rgba(79,70,229,0.05); }

narrative.overview:
A well-organized blackboard where every formula is written neatly, every proof follows a logical structure, and nothing distracts from understanding. The interface serves the mathematics — clean, structured, and confident. It rejects visual noise in favor of typographic clarity and deliberate use of color.

The system is built on restraint: indigo as the single accent, category colors as functional identifiers (not decoration), and generous whitespace that lets complex mathematical formulas breathe. Dark mode is a first-class citizen because students and developers read at night.
keyCharacteristics: Typography-first: math formulas (KaTeX) and prose must be supremely readable
Category color-coding is functional, not decorative
Indigo accent used sparingly — links, active states, the ∑ logo
No shadows at rest; surfaces separated by subtle borders and background tints

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Indigo is the only color that carries meaning beyond category identification. If a new element needs color, it gets indigo or it gets no color at all.

rules.name: The Readability Rule
rules.body: KaTeX formulas must maintain ≥4.5:1 contrast in both modes.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No element has a shadow at rest. Shadows are earned through interaction (hover, focus).

dos: Do maintain ≥4.5:1 contrast on all text, including KaTeX formulas in dark mode
Do use left-border color on post cards as the only category color indicator
Do use indigo as the single interactive accent color throughout
Do cap article prose width at 65ch for comfortable reading
Do test all changes in both light and dark mode
donts: Don't use animations or transitions that distract from reading mathematical content
Don't add shadows to resting elements — flat surfaces with borders only
Don't create cheat-sheet-style layouts with dense grids of formulas and no explanation
Don't use flashy gradients, neon colors, or glassmorphism effects
Don't use meme-style imagery or overly casual copy — this is an academic resource
Don't add more than one accent color family beyond the category identifiers
